creator: gert@greenie.muc.de
text:
Hi,

would it be possible to change the serendipity port to depend on "graphics/ImageMagick6-nox11" instead of "graphics/ImageMagick6"?

This is running on a server system which has nothing else which depends on X11 - and this single dependency brings in about 20 extra packages which are not needed (but need to be updated regularily, etc)

thanks,

gert
